title: Synthetic pilot developmental state objects
description: Public-safe synthetic records for exercising AGD, craniofacial, neonatal, and allometric workflows.
ethics_status: not human subjects; synthetic demo data
citation: Developmental Manifold Atlas synthetic pilot dataset v0.1
provenance: Generated as a public-safe synthetic fixture for repository validation and dashboard smoke tests.
limitations: Synthetic values are not biologically meaningful and must not be used for scientific inference.
